invariants: output.result.cast === undefined || output.result.cast.every(c => Number.isFinite(c.totalCost) && c.totalCost >= 0 && Number.isFinite(c.dailyRate) && Number.isFinite(c.scenes))
contracts.name: castAnalysis

invariants: output.result.locations === undefined || output.result.locations.every(l => Number.isFinite(l.scenes) && Number.isFinite(l.estimatedDays) && l.estimatedDays >= 0 && Array.isArray(l.cast))
contracts.name: scheduleShoot
